MAM-parsed

This site publishes visual call-graph artifacts for the plain and plus parsed formats of Miqra According to the Masorah.

  • Plus template call graphs
  • Plus call graph
  • Plus kaful call graph
  • Plus nusach call graph
  • Plain call graph
  • Plain kaful call graph
  • Plain nusach call graph

These files are published as static artifacts from the repository's gh-pages directory.
